cta.carry: Carry Ăn Là Nhớ in your store
home.h1: Bánh tráng trộn that you'll never forget
home.sub: The original Tây Ninh-style spicy rice-paper salad — hand-mixed, bold, and craveable. Eat it once and you'll remember. Ăn là nhớ.
home.point1.d: Made the Tây Ninh way with real shrimp salt, beef floss, peanuts, and herbs.
home.point2.d: Tossed fresh in small batches so every bag has that street-cart flavor.
home.point3.d: Sealed for freshness and shipped fast, with cold-safe snack packaging.
home.featured.sub: Start here — these fly off the shelf.
home.story.t: From a Tây Ninh street cart to your door
home.story.d: “Ăn là nhớ” means “eat it and you'll remember.” We bring the exact bánh tráng trộn we grew up with to snack lovers across America — nothing watered-down, nothing generic.
home.b2b.t: Sell Ăn Là Nhớ in your store or market
home.b2b.d: Distributors, importers, grocers, and restaurants: stock the authentic Tây Ninh snack your customers are searching for.
shop.sub: Authentic bánh tráng trộn, sealed fresh and shipped to your door.
product.shipping.d: Ships within 1–2 business days. Sealed for freshness. See our Shipping & Returns policy for details.
product.notfound: Product not found. Return to the shop.
wholesale.h1: Carry the authentic Tây Ninh snack
wholesale.sub: Partner with Ăn Là Nhớ to bring real bánh tráng trộn to your shelves. Strong margins, fast-moving SKUs, and a brand your customers already crave.
wholesale.why1.d: Competitive wholesale pricing with tiered volume discounts.
wholesale.why2.d: A viral, search-driven snack with a loyal Vietnamese-American following.
wholesale.why3.d: Barcoded, shelf-stable, case-packed, and clearly labeled for compliance.
wholesale.pack.v: Retail bags + master cases; private-label on request
wholesale.form.d: Tell us about your business and we'll reply within 2 business days.
footer.tagline: Authentic Tây Ninh bánh tráng trộn. Eat it and you'll remember.
footer.address: TN Delicacy Distribution LLC · United States
cookie.text: We use cookies for cart, analytics, and a better experience.
wholesale.f.success: Thank you! Your wholesale inquiry has been received. Our team will reply within 1–2 business days.
